raw_request: We need a GPU for an AI workstation. It must fit inside our compact case (max 300mm), power draw must stay under 250W, budget under €650, arrive within a week, and include at least 1 year warranty.

We're setting up a small training rig for fine-tuning open-source models. We need a high-VRAM GPU, our case supports up to 340mm, the power supply can handle up to 350W, budget is around €1800, and we need it within 2 weeks. Enterprise-grade warranty preferred.

We need an affordable GPU for 3D rendering in our small studio. Small form factor case (max 230mm), keep power draw under 180W, budget is tight at €350, need it within 10 days, and at least 1 year warranty.
We need ergonomic office chairs for our team. Each chair must support a load rating of at least 120kg, budget is €400 per chair, delivery within 10 days, and a minimum 2-year warranty.

We need proximity sensors for our assembly line. IP rating must be at least 67, detection range must be at least 5 meters, budget is €500 per unit, delivery within 14 days, and at least 1 year warranty.
